Editorial manga discovery

Mangastoon

Search any manga and unify the visual metadata from MyAnimeList with the internal MangaDex identifier in one elegant view.

Featured shelf

Curated entry points

A starter shelf to make the landing feel alive before the first search.

Dark fantasy

Berserk

Brutalist violence, mythic scale, iconic black-ink intensity.

Seinen classic

Vagabond

Meditative swordsmanship with painterly motion and silence.

Psychological

Monster

European noir tension, ethical dread, unforgettable pacing.
